passives.name: Fill the Soul
passives.effects: Gain a charge each time you or champions within 800 units cast an [[champion ability|ability]], up to 30. At maximum charges, gain {{as|{{pp|100 to 250}} ability power}} and {{as|{{pp|15 to 25|key=%}} '''bonus''' movement speed}} for the rest of the round, as well as a {{pp|400 to 750}} {{tip|shield}} that lasts until destroyed. Charges are reset every round and between each phase in a round.

effects_structured.raw: Gain a charge each time you or champions within 800 units cast an [[champion ability ability]], up to 30

At maximum charges, gain {{as {{pp 100 to 250}} ability power}} and {{as {{pp 15 to 25 key=%}} '''bonus''' movement speed}} for the rest of the round, as well as a {{pp 400 to 750}} {{tip shield}} that lasts until destroyed

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Fill the Soul gains one charge when the user or nearby champions (within 800 units) cast abilities, up to 30 charges.
Player-visible behavior: hitting maximum charges grants round-duration ability power and movement speed bonuses plus a shield that persists until broken.
Charge state resets between Arena rounds and between phases within a round.
